test.name: Add One Item To Cart

kw.name: Open Browser To Login Page
Evaluate
kw.msg: ${options} = <selenium.webdriver.chrome.options.Options object at 0x7fa21d6eac10>

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.msg: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.
kw.status: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Opens browser and goes to login page.
kw.status: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'

kw.name: Close Test Browser
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closes the browser after each test.

test.doc: Add backpack — cart must have 1 item.
test.status: Setup failed: Calling method 'add_argument' failed: TypeError: ArgOptions.add_argument() got an unexpected keyword argument '--window-size'

test.name: Add Two Items To Cart
